revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初十]][[zh:八月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 10|qq=August 10}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|en|708|qid=Q23511|lt=708|1=708}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – Issued copper coins, the “{{ill|Wadōkaichin|en|Wadōkaichin|qid=Q3565040|lt=Wadōkaichin|1=Wadōkaichin}}.” * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|729|en|729|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – The daughter of {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara Fuhitō|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}}, {{ill|Kōmyōshi|ja|光明子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōmyōshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 光明皇后|1=Empress Kōmyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q837932}}, became the consort of {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}}, the first non-imperial to become empress. * {{ill|Jōei|en|Jōei|qid=Q1194168|lt=Jōei|1=Jōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1232|en|1232|qid=Q5418|lt=1232|1=1232}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – The {{ill|Goseibai Shikimoku|en|Goseibai Shikimoku|qid=Q63889|lt=Code of Law of War|1=Goseibai Shikimoku}} (Jōei Shikimoku) was established. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|September 18|en|September 18|qid=Q2893|lt=September 18|1=September 18}}) – During the {{ill|Siebold Incident|ja|シーボルト事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siebold Incident|1=Siebold Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11308893}}, {{ill|Luis de Flois|ja|シーボルト|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Luis de Flois|1=Siebold|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1961155}} attempted to smuggle out Japanese maps and other forbidden items. His ship was driven ashore in a storm, the plot was exposed, and after an initial interrogation he was exiled. == Births == * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (Ming)|1=正德}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1507|en|1507|qid=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Jiajing Emperor|en|Jiajing Emperor|qid=Q10011|lt=Jiajing Emperor|1=Jiajing Emperor}}, the 12th Emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|qid=Q9903|lt=Ming Dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}}, (died {{ill|1566|en|1566|qid=Q6638|lt=1566|1=1566}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1603|en|1603|qid=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorifusa|en|Tokugawa Yorifusa|qid=Q1133680|lt=Tokugawa Yorifusa|1=Tokugawa Yorifusa}}<ref>{{Citation|和書|editor=勝浦市史編さん委員会|title=勝浦市史 通史編|year=2006|page=406|qq=}}</ref>, the first lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} and the eleventh son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (died {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}}). * {{ill|Qianlong|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianlong|qq=}} 47th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|en|Daoguang Emperor|qid=Q334351|lt=Daoguang Emperor|1=Daoguang Emperor}}, the 8th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|qid=Q8733|lt=Qing Dynasty|1=Qing dynasty}}, (died {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1830|en|1830|qid=Q7576|lt=1830|1=1830}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|qid=Q2885|lt=September 26|1=September 26}}) – {{ill|Ōkubo Toshimichi|en|Ōkubo Toshimichi|qid=Q356118|lt=Ōkubo Toshimichi|1=Ōkubo Toshimichi}}, a founding statesman of the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|qid=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}}, (died {{ill|1878|en|1878|qid=Q7776|lt=1878|1=1878}} <ref>遠矢浩規『利通暗殺 紀尾井町事件の基礎的研究』（行人社、1986年）</ref>). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Ōi Kentarō|ja|大井憲太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōi Kentarō|1=Kentarō Ōi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432179}}, a politician (died {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gendoku|1=Gentoku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1329|en|1329|qid=Q5894|lt=1329|1=1329}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Nichiyū (Shimono-busa)|ja|日秀 (下野房)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichiyū (Shimono-busa)|1=Q11509957|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11509957}}, a monk of the {{ill|Hokke-shū|ja|法華宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokke-shū|1=Hokke-shū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q44733349}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1693|en|1693|qid=Q7689|lt=1693|1=1693}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Ihara Saikaku|en|Ihara Saikaku|qid=Q352561|lt=Ihara Saikaku|1=Ihara Saikaku}}, a haiku poet and writer of ukiyo-zōshi (born {{ill|1642|en|1642|qid=Q6912|lt=1642|1=1642}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Shūsaku|en|Hon'inbō Shūsaku|qid=Q511141|lt=Hon'inbō Shūsaku|1=Hon'inbō Shūsaku}}, an influential Go player (棋士) (born {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}}). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Yōkai Day|ja|妖怪日|qid=Q135490370|1=Yōkai Day}} and {{ill|Shibasashi|ja|シバサシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shibasashi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135490490|1=Yōkai Day}} ({{JPN|qq=}} {{ill|Okinawa Prefecture|en|Okinawa Prefecture|qid=Q766445|lt=沖縄県|1=Okinawa Prefecture}}) :* A day when all {{ill|Yōkai|en|Yōkai|qid=Q503186|lt=yōkai|1=Yōkai}} are believed to appear.<ref>{{Cite book | 和書 | author=水木しげる | authorlink=水木しげる | title=決定版 日本妖怪大全 | page=243 | chapter={{ill|Kijimuna|en|Kijimuna|qid=Q93651|lt=Kijimunā|1=Kijimuna}} | year=2014 | publisher=講談社 | series=講談社文庫|qq=}}</ref> The term “Shibasashi” (柴差) originates from the use of a protective charm known as “shiba.”
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|9|8|11|7|10|9|8|0810|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 10일]] [[ja:8月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初十]]
[[ar:August 10 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初十]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:八月初十]]
